name: Shopify
keyRequirement: Fast loading WebP images (under 100KB) to improve Core Web Vitals, reduce bounce rates, and increase sales.

name: Instagram
keyRequirement: Perfect 1:1 or 4:5 aspect ratios to prevent algorithmic cropping and maintain feed aesthetic.

name: Discord
keyRequirement: Strict 25MB file size limits for free users when sharing memes, videos, and high-res screenshots.

name: WordPress
keyRequirement: Next-Gen format support (AVIF or WebP) with embedded alt-text for maximum Google Search visibility.

name: Facebook
keyRequirement: Optimized Open Graph (OG) images to ensure link previews look professional and clickable.

name: Twitter / X
keyRequirement: High-contrast, fast-loading media that stands out in a rapidly scrolling timeline.

name: LinkedIn
keyRequirement: Professional, unpixelated corporate banners and sharp headshots for professional branding.

name: YouTube
keyRequirement: High-saturation JPGs under 2MB that drive high Click-Through Rates (CTR).

name: Twitch
keyRequirement: Transparent PNGs and GIFs with exact dimensions for emotes, badges, and stream overlays.

name: TikTok
keyRequirement: Vertical 9:16 aspect ratio formatting to natively fit mobile screens.
